vulnerabilities.description: The GroupService and repository methods do not currently enforce authorization checks to verify that the requesting user is the admin or has permission to modify a group.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement RBAC checks in the service methods to ensure that only users with the appropriate roles or ownership (i.e., group admin) can perform sensitive operations like linking a Telegram chat or updating group details.

vulnerabilities.description: The Types.ObjectId is used without additional input validation in some cases, which could be improved.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that all ObjectId inputs are validated with a library like Zod or Joi to confirm they are valid ObjectId strings before being processed.
